title: On finite groups admitting automorphisms with nilpotent fixed-point group
journal: Bulletin of the Australian Mathematical Society
abstract: Let p denote a prime, G a finite p′-group and A an elementary atelian group of operators on G. Suppose that A has order p3 and that if w ∈ A# then CG(w) is nilpotent. It is proved that G is nilpotent.
